questions.enonce: Which expression is used to give your opinion?
'I totally agree with you' means you have the same opinion as the person.
I'm {{1}} (désolé), but I disagree with your point of view.

questions.question: Match the expression to its meaning.

pairs.left: I'm not so sure about that
pairs.right: Je n'en suis pas si sûr
